## Summary

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit`
- [ ] `npm test`

## Scope check

- [ ] No write-back to `.vcf`
- [ ] No contact note creation or export
- [ ] No external app launch actions
- [ ] No network, clipboard, eval, or dynamic code execution APIs
- [ ] Remote PHOTO URLs are not loaded
